news.title:
Torrent Power accepts bids worth ₹20B for 8-10 year bonds.
The company will pay an annual interest rate, bankers said.
news.summary:
Torrent Power accepts bids worth ₹20B for 8-10 year bonds.
The company will pay an annual interest rate, bankers said.

news.title:
Torrent Power approves Q3 results, declares interim dividend of ₹15/share.
Plans to raise ₹7,000 crore via NCDs; posts ₹712.2 crore Q3 profit.
news.summary:
Torrent Power approves Q3 results, declares interim dividend of ₹15/share.
Plans to raise ₹7,000 crore via NCDs; posts ₹712.2 crore Q3 profit.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Torrent Power's long-term rating at 'AA/Stable' and short-term at 'A1'.
The ratings highlight strong profitability, steady cash flow, and healthy net leverage improvement from 2.2x to 1.4x.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Torrent Power's long-term rating at 'AA/Stable' and short-term at 'A1'.
The ratings highlight strong profitability, steady cash flow, and healthy net leverage improvement from 2.2x to 1.4x.

news.title:
L&T Power Development to sell 100% stake in Nabha Power Ltd to Torrent Power for Rs 6,000 crore.
M&A activity in power sector rises as PPAs enhance company valuations.
news.summary:
L&T Power Development to sell 100% stake in Nabha Power Ltd to Torrent Power for Rs 6,000 crore.
M&A activity in power sector rises as PPAs enhance company valuations.

news.title:
Torrent Power Ltd announced a virtual Analyst/Investor Meet with Axis Mutual Fund on Feb 27, 2026.
The meeting is scheduled at 4:00 PM IST, subject to changes as per SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
Torrent Power Ltd announced a virtual Analyst/Investor Meet with Axis Mutual Fund on Feb 27, 2026.
The meeting is scheduled at 4:00 PM IST, subject to changes as per SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
Citi highlights Torrent Power's EV/MW ratio is below replacement cost, hinting undervaluation.
Torrent Power's assets ensure visibility on power purchase agreements for 13 years.
news.summary:
Citi highlights Torrent Power's EV/MW ratio is below replacement cost, hinting undervaluation.
Torrent Power's assets ensure visibility on power purchase agreements for 13 years.

news.title:
Torrent Power acquires Nabha Power at ~8 EV/EBITDA, per Investec.
Acquisition adds ~38/share to Torrent Power's SOTP valuation.
news.summary:
Torrent Power acquires Nabha Power at ~8 EV/EBITDA, per Investec.
Acquisition adds ~38/share to Torrent Power's SOTP valuation.

news.title: Goldman Sachs states L&T will sell Nabha Power to Torrent Power for 69 billion.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs states L&T will sell Nabha Power to Torrent Power for 69 billion.

news.title:
Torrent Power to acquire 1400 MW coal plant from L&T Power for Rs. 6889 cr EV.
Acquisition ensures stable cash flow, aligns growth strategy, and strengthens North India presence.
news.summary:
Torrent Power to acquire 1400 MW coal plant from L&T Power for Rs. 6889 cr EV.
Acquisition ensures stable cash flow, aligns growth strategy, and strengthens North India presence.

news.title:
Torrent Power acquired 100% equity of Nabha Power from L&T for INR 3,660.9 crores.
This acquisition aims to expand its thermal power generation in Northern India.
news.summary:
Torrent Power acquired 100% equity of Nabha Power from L&T for INR 3,660.9 crores.
This acquisition aims to expand its thermal power generation in Northern India.

news.title:
Larsen & Toubro signs agreement to divest Nabha Power for ₹36.6B.
Nabha Power will be sold to Torrent Power as part of the deal.
news.summary:
Larsen & Toubro signs agreement to divest Nabha Power for ₹36.6B.
Nabha Power will be sold to Torrent Power as part of the deal.

news.title:
Torrent Power announces dividend increase to ₹15, up 7.1% from last year's ₹14; yield remains low at 1.3%.
EPS growth forecast at 21.1%; payout ratio estimated at 31%, indicating sustainable dividend despite cash flow concerns.
news.summary:
Torrent Power announces dividend increase to ₹15, up 7.1% from last year's ₹14; yield remains low at 1.3%.
EPS growth forecast at 21.1%; payout ratio estimated at 31%, indicating sustainable dividend despite cash flow concerns.

news.title:
Torrent Power's Q3 electricity demand fell due to industrial slowdown.
Surat's power demand dropped 4% YoY to 911M units in Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
Torrent Power's Q3 electricity demand fell due to industrial slowdown.
Surat's power demand dropped 4% YoY to 911M units in Q3 FY26.

news.title:
Torrent Power plans 10.6 GW capacity with Rs.14,000 Cr pumped storage.
The company also targets 1.5 GW renewables commissioning.
news.summary:
Torrent Power plans 10.6 GW capacity with Rs.14,000 Cr pumped storage.
The company also targets 1.5 GW renewables commissioning.

news.title:
Torrent Power reported unaudited Q3 and 9-month results. Market cap is approx ₹65,830 Cr.
Operational capacity includes 3,092 MW thermal and 1,947 MW renewables. Pipeline to grow to 10.6 GWp.
news.summary:
Torrent Power reported unaudited Q3 and 9-month results. Market cap is approx ₹65,830 Cr.
Operational capacity includes 3,092 MW thermal and 1,947 MW renewables. Pipeline to grow to 10.6 GWp.

news.title:
Torrent Power's Q3 net profit jumps 35.2%, reaching ₹643 crore.
Revenue grows 4.3% to ₹6,777.8 crore; EBITDA rises 26.2% to ₹1,403 crore.
news.summary:
Torrent Power's Q3 net profit jumps 35.2%, reaching ₹643 crore.
Revenue grows 4.3% to ₹6,777.8 crore; EBITDA rises 26.2% to ₹1,403 crore.

news.title:
Torrent Power's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9-months FY25-26.
Declared interim dividend of ₹15/share and approved NCD issuance up to ₹7,000 Cr via private placement.
news.summary:
Torrent Power's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9-months FY25-26.
Declared interim dividend of ₹15/share and approved NCD issuance up to ₹7,000 Cr via private placement.

news.title:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.
news.summary:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.

news.title:
India Ratings reaffirmed Torrent Power's long-term NCD rating at IND AA (Stable), downgraded from AAA (Stable).
Short-term commercial paper rating affirmed at IND A1, reflecting strong performance and healthy credit metrics despite high capex.
news.summary:
India Ratings reaffirmed Torrent Power's long-term NCD rating at IND AA (Stable), downgraded from AAA (Stable).
Short-term commercial paper rating affirmed at IND A1, reflecting strong performance and healthy credit metrics despite high capex.

news.title:
Torrent Power executed a block trade of 271,740 shares at Rs. 1403.5.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 38.1 crore on NSE.
news.summary:
Torrent Power executed a block trade of 271,740 shares at Rs. 1403.5.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 38.1 crore on NSE.
